Vylan.hero_headline:
You chased every
document by hand.
Vylan.menu_def_text: The backlog of client paperwork an accountant chases by hand — every receipt, statement and form standing between a messy inbox and a closed book.
Vylan.form_sub: We'll connect your client portal, learn what every client still owes, and start chasing — then verify or reject each document as it lands.
Vylan.form_notes: What's the worst part of document season for you right now?
Vylan.form_done_body: We'll reach out within two business days to set up your inbox and your first chase run.
Vylan.form_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
Vylan.form_error_rate: Too many requests right now. Please try again in a few minutes.
Vylan.feat_1_body: Vylan emails and nudges each client for exactly the documents they still owe — politely, on schedule, without you lifting a finger.
Vylan.feat_2_body: Every upload is read on arrival. Vylan checks it's the right document, the right period, legible, and complete.
Vylan.feat_3_body: Clean documents are verified into the ledger. The wrong ones are auto-rejected with a clear reason — and the client is re-chased.

VylanManifesto.title:
You close the books.
We'll fetch the paper.
VylanManifesto.lede: Accounting didn't get slow because the math is hard. It got slow because the documents never arrive on time, in the right format, or at all.
VylanManifesto.body_1: Every close, every filing, every reconciliation waits on the same thing: paper that hasn't shown up yet. A bank statement still in someone's inbox. A receipt photographed sideways. A form filled out for the wrong quarter.
VylanManifesto.body_2: So accountants spend their days chasing — emailing, re-emailing, squinting at blurry scans, rejecting the wrong file, asking again. The work that needs judgment gets buried under the work that just needs follow-through.
VylanManifesto.body_3: Vylan does the chasing. It connects to your client portal, learns exactly what each client still owes, and goes after it — politely, on schedule, without you lifting a finger. It reads every document the moment it lands, verifies the good ones into the ledger, and rejects the bad ones with a clear reason — then keeps asking until the file is clean.
VylanManifesto.body_4: No more being the bottleneck for your own deadlines. No more spending the most expensive hours of the day on the least valuable task. The chasing is the part a machine should do.
VylanManifesto.kicker:
You close the books.
We'll fetch the paper.

Landing.headline: Stop chasing your clients for documents.
Landing.subhead: A simple, bilingual client portal built for Canadian accounting and bookkeeping firms.
Landing.cta_final_body: Get your firm set up in under two minutes. No credit card. No tutorials. Just a cleaner inbox.
Landing.intro_title: The fastest way to get documents from clients — without the email back-and-forth.
Landing.intro_lede: Vylan turns the messiest part of tax and bookkeeping season into a checklist your client can finish on their phone. You stop sending follow-up emails. They stop forgetting attachments. Everyone moves on.
Landing.benefits_title: Reclaim the hours you spend chasing paperwork.
Landing.benefit_1_body: The average firm we talked to spends 6+ hours a week emailing clients for missing slips. Vylan automates that work to zero.
Landing.benefit_2_body: Magic-link onboarding means clients act in minutes instead of days. Your engagements close on schedule, not on hope.
Landing.benefit_3_body: Claude reads each upload and flags the wrong slip before it reaches your queue. No more re-asking for the right T4.
Landing.feature_1_body: Pick a template (T1, T2, bookkeeping), send a magic link. Your clients log in to nothing.
Landing.feature_2_body: We nudge your clients on your behalf, at the right time, in French or English.
Landing.feature_3_body: Catch when a client uploads the wrong slip before it costs you an hour of email back-and-forth.
Landing.ai_body_long: Every time a client uploads a document, Claude reads it. If it's the wrong slip, the wrong year, a blurry photo, or a missing page, you'll know before it ever lands in your queue — and your client gets a polite, bilingual nudge to fix it. You spend your time on the work that actually pays.
Landing.ai_bullet_1: Spots the wrong document — wrong slip, wrong year, missing page — before it reaches your inbox.
Landing.ai_bullet_2: Catches blurry photos and partial scans, then asks the client to re-take them on their phone.
Landing.ai_bullet_3: Sorts uploads by type (T4, T5, RL slips, receipts) so your queue stays organized for you.
Landing.ai_bullet_4: Sends the retry request automatically — no extra clicks, no chasing.
Landing.ai_v2_card_callout_body: Claude confirmed the right slip, the right year, and a clean scan. Filed and ready for tax prep.
Landing.ai_v2_title: When it's right, it just flows
Landing.ai_v2_body: When the upload checks out, Claude tags it, files it, and lets your client know it landed. No follow-ups, no re-asking, no second-guessing. The slip is exactly where you need it when you sit down to do the return.
Landing.ai_v2_bullet_1: Confirms the document type, year, and image quality the moment it's uploaded.
Landing.ai_v2_bullet_2: Auto-tags and files it in the right client folder for the season.
Landing.ai_v2_bullet_3: Sends the client a bilingual confirmation so they know you got it.
Landing.ai_v2_bullet_4: Frees you up for the actual tax work instead of chasing paperwork.
Landing.step_1_title: Sign up in under a minute
Landing.step_1_body: No card required. Add a few clients, pick a template, you're ready.
Landing.step_2_body: Your client clicks once, uploads their slips on their phone. No password, no app to download.
Landing.step_3_body: AI flags the wrong document before you have to. You spend your time on actual accounting work.
Landing.faq_1_q: Do my clients need to create an account?
Landing.faq_1_a: No. They click the magic link in the email you send and they're on their personal portal. The link is private and expires in 90 days.
Landing.faq_2_q: Is the data stored in Canada?
Landing.faq_2_a: Vylan is built around Canadian privacy law — PIPEDA and Quebec's Law 25. We're happy to walk through our specific data-processing setup (subprocessors, storage region, transfer disclosures) on the demo call.
Landing.faq_3_q: What if I want to cancel?
Landing.faq_3_a: Pricing is set during a 15-minute call with the founder right now — we're sizing each firm individually instead of running a fixed plan grid. No annual lock-in. You can stop at any time and we'll help you export everything you've uploaded.
Landing.faq_4_q: Can I import my existing client list?
Landing.faq_4_a: Yes. The /clients page has a CSV import that accepts paste-in or file upload, with column headers in either French or English. Most accounting software exports a compatible CSV.

Profile.section_language_hint: Switches the UI immediately. Emails to clients use the recipient's language, not yours.

Profile.mfa_hint: Adds a 6-digit code from your authenticator app on every sign-in. Strongly recommended for accounts that handle client tax data.

Profile.mfa_step_verify_subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code your app is showing right now.
Profile.mfa_step_recovery_subtitle: Save these recovery codes somewhere safe.
Profile.mfa_step_qr_intro: We'll show you a QR code to scan with Google Authenticator, 1Password, Authy, or any other authenticator app.
Profile.mfa_step_qr_help: Or paste the secret manually into your app if you can't scan.
Profile.mfa_step_verify_intro: Open your authenticator app — it should show a 6-digit code for Vylan that changes every 30 seconds.
Profile.mfa_step_recovery_intro: If you lose access to your authenticator app, you can use one of these single-use codes to sign in. Each code works exactly once. Keep them somewhere offline (printed, password manager, etc.).
Profile.mfa_step_recovery_saved_confirm: I have saved my recovery codes somewhere safe.
Profile.mfa_secret_label: Or type this secret into your app
Profile.mfa_disable_subtitle: Confirm your password to turn off 2FA. We'll also delete your recovery codes.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.owner_only_note: Your firm's settings (logo, name, branding, default client language) are managed by the firm owner.
Settings.subtitle: Display preferences and firm behaviour. Your account and firm info live in your profile.
Settings.section_theme_hint: Light, dark, or follow your system.
Settings.section_firm_settings_hint: Your firm's logo, name, brand color, and the language clients receive emails in.
Settings.mode_hint: Light, dark, or follow your system.
Settings.section_language_hint: Switches the app interface immediately. Doesn't affect what your clients see.
Settings.section_timezone_hint: Used when Vylan schedules reminders and shows times in client emails and SMS.
Settings.section_firm_prefs_hint: Controls how Vylan handles unreadable uploads from your clients.
Settings.section_ai_hint: How Vylan's AI handles your client documents.
Settings.section_doc_handling_hint: How Vylan handles uploads coming in from your clients.
Settings.auto_reject_help: When on, Vylan automatically rejects uploads that are unreadable, incomplete, or not the document that was requested, and asks the client to resubmit. When off, these are queued for your review.
Settings.ai_paused_hint: Your monthly limit is reached — AI checks are paused until the reset. Uploads still work; review documents manually until then.
Settings.section_billing_hint: Manage your plan, payment method, and invoices.
Settings.section_subscription_hint: Your current plan and renewal date.
Settings.sub_no_subscription_hint: You're on a free trial. Talk to us when you'd like to upgrade.
Settings.section_data_hint: Your data is yours. Export everything as a ZIP, any time.
Settings.data_export_hint: Clients, engagements, files, and activity log. One ZIP. May take a minute.
Settings.data_delete_hint: Sends an email to support — we'll wipe everything within 24 hours.
Settings.section_audit_hint: Every action on every engagement — who did what, when. Show a client what happened to their file, or trace a question after the fact.
Settings.go_live_title: You're in demo mode — emails to clients are paused.
Settings.go_live_body: While your firm is a demo, automated reminders won't send to your clients. Switch to live mode to start sending real emails and turn on the full app — the demo banner disappears and any paused reminders resume on the next run of our cron (within 15 minutes).

Templates.templates_new_hint: Build a checklist tailored to your firm. You can also clone a built-in above to start from a familiar list.

Pricing.title: Simple, flat pricing
Pricing.subtitle: Pick the plan that fits your firm. No annual commit. Try out a demo before you buy.
Pricing.talk_banner: Custom pricing — built around your firm
Pricing.talk_title: Let's set a fair price together
Pricing.talk_body: Every cabinet's workload looks different — we'd rather understand yours and quote a fair number than push you into a one-size-fits-all plan. Tell us what your firm needs, or take Vylan for a spin first and we'll follow up.
Pricing.talk_call_body: Tell us about your firm in 2 minutes. From there, try the demo or book a 15-minute call — your pick. We'll quote a fair price together.
Pricing.talk_email_body: Reach out and we'll book a 20-minute call to walk through the right fit for your firm.
Pricing.response_time: We usually reply within an hour during business hours.
Pricing.talk_demo_body: See Vylan in action with realistic sample data, no commitment.
Pricing.talk_footnote: Existing customers always lock in their pricing before any future change.
Pricing.subtitle_long: No annual contracts. No per-seat surprise fees. Cancel any time.
Pricing.trial_note: Try out a demo of every plan first. No card required until you decide to subscribe.
Pricing.currency_note: Prices are in Canadian dollars (CAD). Applicable sales tax may apply.
Pricing.trial_banner: Try out a demo on every plan — no credit card required
Pricing.trial_feature: Demo included — try before you buy
Pricing.plan_cabinet_tagline: For small firms with a few teammates.

Billing.title: Billing
Billing.subtitle: Manage your plan, payment method, and billing history.
Billing.placeholder_subtitle: Pricing is on hold while we onboard our first clients.
Billing.placeholder_body: We're working directly with each cabinet to set fair prices together. No plan to pick today — just keep using Vylan. Book a 20-minute call below and we'll walk through your firm's workflow and the right fit.
Billing.response_time: We usually reply within an hour during business hours.
Billing.trial_expired: Your demo period has ended. Pick a plan below to keep using Vylan.
Billing.billing_note: Payment is processed by Stripe. We never see your card number.
Billing.stripe_not_configured: Billing isn't set up yet on this server. Subscriptions are disabled.

Terms.draft_banner_body: This document is a template starting point and has not been reviewed by a lawyer. Do not rely on it for legal advice or use it in production.
Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.p_acceptance: By creating an account or using Vylan (the "Service"), you agree to these terms. If you don't agree, don't use the Service.
Terms.p_service: Vylan is a document-collection tool for accounting and bookkeeping firms. Firms create request checklists; their clients upload documents through a portal. We process and store those documents to deliver the Service.
Terms.p_accounts: You are responsible for keeping your login credentials secure and for all activity under your account. Notify us immediately at the email below if you suspect unauthorized access.
Terms.p_subscription: Paid plans are billed monthly in Canadian dollars. While our pricing is under review you may use Vylan in demo mode with no payment method required — we'll agree on pricing together before any charge. Once you are on a paid plan, you may cancel at any time from your billing page; cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period.
Terms.p_data: You own the documents and information you upload. You grant us a non-exclusive license to host, process, and display that data solely to provide the Service. We will never sell your data or your clients' data.
Terms.p_acceptable_use: Do not upload illegal content, attempt to break security controls, or use the Service to impersonate someone. We may suspend accounts that violate these terms.
Terms.p_intellectual: The Service, its design, code, and content (other than your data) are owned by us. You may not copy, resell, or reverse-engineer the Service without written permission.
Terms.p_termination: Either party may terminate this agreement. On termination, you may export your data within 30 days; after that, we may permanently delete it.
Terms.p_warranty: The Service is provided "as is." We don't guarantee that it will be uninterrupted or error-free. To the maximum extent permitted by law, we disclaim all warranties.
Terms.p_law: These terms are governed by the laws of the Province of Quebec and the laws of Canada applicable therein.

Demo.booking_subheading: Thanks {name}! Pick a slot below for your demo.
Demo.booked_body: We sent you an email with the details. See you soon!
Demo.booked_try_demo_heading: Want to poke around while you wait?
Demo.booked_try_demo_body: Spin up a free demo workspace pre-loaded with sample clients and engagements. No card required — you can play with the real product before your call.
Demo.banner_body: Browse with sample clients and engagements. Talk to us when you're ready to onboard your real firm.
Demo.block_default_reason: This action would touch real clients, so it's gated while you're in demo mode.
Demo.block_body: While Vylan is in demo mode, anything that would create a real client or send a real email is paused. Reach out and we'll set you up with full access — either to pay now or to talk pricing first.
Demo.response_time: We usually reply within an hour during business hours.
Demo.block_add_client_reason: Adding a real client would write to your firm's live data. While you're in demo mode, the clients you see are sample data — get in touch to add your own.
Demo.block_import_csv_reason: Importing a CSV of clients would write your real client list into demo data. Get in touch and we'll bring you out of demo mode first.
Demo.block_send_engagement_reason: Sending an engagement would email a real client. While you're in demo mode, that's paused — the sample engagements already have a magic link you can preview.
Demo.block_send_reminder_reason: Sending a reminder would email or text a real client. While you're in demo mode, that's paused. Get in touch to enable real client communications.

Privacy.draft_banner_body: This privacy notice is a template starting point and has not been reviewed by a lawyer. Review with counsel before production use.
Privacy.title: Privacy Notice
Privacy.p_overview: This notice explains what personal information we collect, why, and what your rights are. It is written to comply with Quebec's Act respecting the protection of personal information in the private sector (Law 25) and Canada's Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA).
Privacy.p_what_we_collect:
Account data (firm name, contact info, email).
Client data the firm enters (display name, email, phone, locale, notes).
Documents uploaded by clients (tax slips, statements, receipts).
Usage data (which pages were viewed, IP address for security, browser type).
Privacy.p_why:
To provide the Service: deliver the magic-link portal, store and deliver documents to the firm, generate reminders, run AI classification.
To bill paying customers.
To improve the Service.
To comply with legal obligations.
Privacy.p_law25: We have a designated person responsible for the protection of personal information, reachable at the contact email below. By default, your firm's privacy settings are set to the most protective level. We will inform you before any new use of your data outside the original purposes.
Privacy.p_residency: All client documents and metadata are stored in Canadian regions (Supabase ca-central-1, S3-compatible). Transactional emails are sent via a processor that may transit data through US infrastructure; document content itself is never included in those emails.
Privacy.p_sharing: We do not sell personal information. We share data only with the subprocessors listed below, and only as needed to operate the Service.
Privacy.p_subprocessors:
Supabase (hosting, database, storage — Canada).
Resend (email delivery — US).
Twilio (SMS delivery — US).
Anthropic (document classification — US; documents are processed and not retained).
Stripe (payment processing — US/Canada).
Privacy.p_security: Data at rest is encrypted by Supabase. Data in transit uses TLS. Access to firm data is enforced by Row-Level Security at the database layer. Document downloads use short-lived signed URLs.
Privacy.p_retention: We retain firm and client data for as long as your account is active, and for up to 90 days after cancellation to allow data export. Audit logs (who did what, when) are retained for 2 years.
Privacy.p_rights: You have the right to access, correct, port, or request deletion of your personal information, and to withdraw consent. Contact us using the address below to exercise these rights.
Privacy.p_breach: If we become aware of a confidentiality incident involving your personal information, we will notify you and the Commission d'accès à l'information du Québec where required.
